comment.description: A brief description or note about the origin request policy.

cookies_config.description: Configuration that specifies how cookies are handled by the origin request policy.

etag.description: The version identifier for the origin request policy, used for tracking changes.

headers_config.description: Configuration that specifies which headers are included in requests sent to the origin.

query_strings_config.description: Configuration that determines how query strings are handled in requests to the origin.
